calendar.matters:
Mtn For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar May-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Genesis Recovery Services' motion for terminating sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. The Court finds that further orders would not result in compliance. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

MOTION For Relief From Dismissal
Off Calendar Mar-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF GENESIS RECOVERY SERVICES' MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DISMISSAL.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER, COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/PJM/JU) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2007 Dismissal - No Appearance

MOTION TO COMPEL ADMISSIONS OF FACT AND GENUINESS OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Dec-27-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Genesis Recovery Services' motion to compel responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents and to deem certain matters admitted is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $350 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Set For Trial On Jan-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
